body.title: IgorShim — BaseShim subclass with install/connect/capability-reading (G-decision § 14)
body.result: IgorShim ships per G-decision § 14: install (idempotent) + connect (announces, raises ConnectionError on timeout) + capability-reading forwarders. BaseShim contract (device_id, start/stop/restart, self_test, rollback). 12 new tests; 188 passed. agent_datacenter commit 0872937.
body.description:
IgorShim is the datacenter's view of an Igor instance — a BaseShim subclass that wraps a DatacenterClient so the rack can start/stop/restart Igor and query its capability manifest through a stable shim API. Per G-decision (§ 14): install + connect + capability-reading. install() ensures a runtime profile exists for this Igor instance (copies canonical → runtime, idempotent). connect() instantiates a DatacenterClient and runs announce(). The capability-reading methods (get_tools, get_state_refs, get_channels) forward to the cached client. Lifecycle methods from BaseShim (start/stop/restart/self_test/rollback) are implemented but lightweight — Igor process management is not in this slice.

**Affected files:** /home/akien/dev/src/agent_datacenter/agent_datacenter/announce/igor_shim.py (NEW), /home/akien/dev/src/agent_datacenter/agent_datacenter/announce/__init__.py (export IgorShim), /home/akien/dev/src/agent_datacenter/tests/test_igor_shim.py (NEW)
**Design rules:** install() is idempotent (safe to re-run); connect() raises ConnectionError when announce times out — caller decides whether to retry; capability accessors return [] when not connected (graceful, mirrors DatacenterClient).
**Scope boundary:** in — IgorShim class implementing BaseShim contract, install/connect lifecycle, capability-reading forwarders, unit tests covering all paths. Out — actual Igor process spawn (slice 4 or later — IgorShim assumes Igor runs externally), inotify-driven re-announce (slice 3b invalidator ticket), shim auto-restart on Igor crash.
**Test plan:** test_install_creates_runtime_profile_idempotent; test_install_skips_when_runtime_already_exists; test_connect_announces_and_caches_client (uses in-process Skeleton + IMAP stub); test_connect_raises_on_announce_timeout; test_get_tools_forwards_to_client; test_get_tools_empty_before_connect; test_self_test_returns_passed_when_connected; test_self_test_returns_failed_when_not_connected; test_start_stop_idempotent.
